## Summary

Describe the focused change and the user-visible reason for it.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes
- [ ] Relevant manual verification is documented
- [ ] Notification or service-worker changes were checked in an installed iPhone PWA when applicable
- [ ] Documentation matches changed commands, configuration, or behavior

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] No access token, token hash, private key, push endpoint, Cloudflare credential or Account ID is included
- [ ] No real medication name, history, personal data, database export, private log, or personal deployment URL is included
- [ ] Fixtures and screenshots use synthetic data only
- [ ] The change does not deploy or mutate production state

## Accessibility

- [ ] Keyboard, focus, labels, contrast, non-color communication, and iPhone layout were considered
